packageRules.description: Guest-image ci pins (the NEWEST-end versions in scripts/tjs-legs.mjs): a bump must prove itself on the actual leg, so automerge waits for green CI. Release floor pins are policy-frozen and deliberately NOT extracted.
solaris vmactions confs mix toolchain variants (gcc/clang) into one namespace; track only the gcc line the leg is built around.

customManagers.description: ci-guest-version pins in the tjs leg manifest, annotated in place with `// renovate: datasource=... depName=...` on the preceding line. JSONata transforms proven against the live APIs 2026-07-11.

cpa-freebsd-x86-64.description: OS versions = the x86-64 image assets of the newest cross-platform-actions/freebsd-builder release (Renovate's built-in github-releases datasource sees only the BUILDER's own version tags).

cpa-omnios-x86-64.description: OS versions = the x86-64 image assets of the newest cross-platform-actions/omnios-builder release.

vmactions-solaris.description: vmactions guest versions are conf filenames in the action repo.
